title: Final Touches — Animations and Print
description: Put the finishing touches on your blog theme. Define a @keyframes fadeIn animation and apply it to .post elements so they gracefully appear when the page loads. Then add @media print rules to create a clean printable version: hide the navigation, remove box-shadows, and ensure the layout is print-friendly. Your blog theme is now complete!
test_code:
assert '@keyframes' in css.lower(), 'Missing @keyframes rule for animation'
assert 'animation' in css.lower(), 'Missing animation property on .post'
assert '@media' in css.lower() and 'print' in css.lower(), 'Missing @media print rule for print styles'
acceptance_criteria: @media print rules hide navigation and remove box-shadows
The complete blog theme is responsive, animated, and print-friendly
hints: Apply it with: animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease-in;
In @media print, use .nav { display: none; } and .post { box-shadow: none; }
